title: Manufacturing Engineer - Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates:
Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates!
